titleStmt.title: SII 34.56: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 56. Tiruvaigāvūr, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the west wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bilvanātēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājēndra III, 5th, Mēsha, sudi 4, Monday, Rōhiṇi = A.D. 1251, March 27, Monday.

Sale of land by the trustees of the temple of Tiruvaikāvuḍaiyār to Vāmaśiva-Mudaliyār of the lineage of the Mudaliyārs of Chelva-Tiruvārūr (maṭha). The sale amount of 3000 kāsu was meant for the supply of unguents to the image of Villavana-Perumāḷ in this temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājEntiracOḻa tEvarkku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu me[ ṣa nā]
yaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu catuttiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rōcaṇi nāḷ Uṭaiyār tiruvaiykāvuṭai
yār kōyil Ādicaṇṭēśvaratēvar tiruvaruḷāl Innāyaṉār kōyil Āticaṇṭēśvaratēvar
ccelvattiruvāruril mutaliyār vāmacivamutaliyār
var Iṉṉāyanār kōyil perumakkaḷ tirumāḷikaikku
nīkki jīvaṉattukku Uṭalāka ciṟutu nilaṅkaḷāṉa mai
maiyil ṭu Aṉupavittup pōtukiṟa nilaṅ
kaḷil Akaram śrīirārāccatuppēti maṅkalattum piṭākai Ariyalūril maṇalūr vikkirama cōḻa brahmārāyar
makanār kulōttuṅka cōḻa brahmārāyar pakkal vilaikoṇṭu Aṉupavittuppōtukiṟa puvanimuḻutuṭai
kkuk kiḻakkun tirucciṟṟampala vāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Añcāñcatirattu nilam Āṟumā
ṭaiya nilam mūnṟumāvil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam ciṉṉam Iṉṉilam Araimāviṉ ciṉṉamum caṇṭē
śvavarap peruvilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttu Iṟṟaināḷāl paṇṭārattuk kaikkoṇṭa kācu mūvāyiramum kai
kkoṇṭu Innilam Araimāvin cinnamum viṟṟukkuṭuttu Ūrmāvīnta kaṭamai kuṭimai cīpaṇṭārattilē Iṟukkaṭa
vatākavum Innilatti nam tirumāḷikaiyilē nam yārkaḷukku
nilattukkuṭalākavum Ippaṭi cantirātittaval cellakkaṭavatākavum Ikkācu mūvāyiramum Innāyanār kō
yil villavanapperumāḷ tirumeḻuku cātti Eḻuntaru ṉāyanārkku kaikkoṇṭu Inni
lam Araimāvin cinnamum tirukkaikoṭṭi ṭuttōm Āṇṭa ruṣa tēvaṟkku In
nāyanār kōyil Āticaṇṭēśvara tēvakanmi ppiriyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Ivai śrīmāheśvarapiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vīranampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai kapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vīranampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ikkō
yil caivācāryamum pūcaiyum kāṇivuṭaiya nakasa Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai purāṇa cikara
ṇi paṇḍitan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivait tavaccakkaravatti Āṭa n Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Ivai
Ārūruṭaiyāṉ tiruppuṟampiya muṭaiyān Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
